title: Line 10130 – Wage-loss replacement contributions - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 10130 – Wage-loss replacement contributions
If you received payments from a wage-loss replacement plan (WLRP) shown in box 14 of your T4 slip , you may not have to report the full amount on your return. Report the amount you received minus the contributions you made to the plan if you did not use them on a previous year’s return.
Do not include this amount when you calculate your total income on line 15000 of your return.

## Completing your tax return
Report, on line 10130 of your return, your total contributions to your WLRP shown in the supporting documents from your employer or insurance company.
For more information, see archived Interpretation Bulletin IT-428 , Wage Loss Replacement Plans .
Keep your supporting documents in case the CRA asks to see them later.

## Forms and publications
- Interpretation Bulletin IT-428 ARCHIVED, Wage Loss Replacement Plans
- Line 10100 – Employment income

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
